mapper.select:
WITH zone_rebalance_stats AS ( SELECT zone_id, AVG(speed_label) AS avg_speed_per_hour, MAX(zone_backlog) AS total_remaining_qty, MAX(batch_id) AS current_batch_id, MAX(time_to_deadline_min) AS time_to_deadline_min, MAX(zone_blocking_issue_cnt) AS block_cnt, SUM(COALESCE(NULLIF(speed_label, 0), worker_speed_30m_avg, 0)) AS cap_per_hour FROM rebalance_snapshots WHERE ts >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE) GROUP BY zone_id ), zone_risk AS ( SELECT zrs.zone_id AS zone_id, zrs.total_remaining_qty AS backlog, zrs.time_to_deadline_min AS deadline_min, zrs.cap_per_hour AS cap_per_hour, CASE WHEN COALESCE(zrs.block_cnt, 0) > 0 THEN GREATEST( COALESCE(zrs.total_remaining_qty, 0) - (COALESCE(zrs.cap_per_hour, 0) * (COALESCE(zrs.time_to_deadline_min, 0) / 60.0)), 0 ) * 0.2 ELSE GREATEST( COALESCE(zrs.total_remaining_qty, 0) - (COALESCE(zrs.cap_per_hour, 0) * (COALESCE(zrs.time_to_deadline_min, 0) / 60.0)), 0 ) END AS risk FROM zone_rebalance_stats zrs ), zone_worker_counts AS ( SELECT z.zone_id AS zone_id, COUNT(DISTINCT wl.worker_id) AS worker_count FROM zones z LEFT JOIN users u ON u.assigned_zone_id = z.zone_id AND u.role = 'WORKER' LEFT JOIN work_logs wl ON wl.worker_id = u.user_id AND wl.ended_at IS NULL GROUP BY z.zone_id ), zone_worker_ranks AS ( SELECT zone_id, worker_count, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY worker_count ASC) AS rank_low, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY worker_count DESC) AS rank_high, MIN(worker_count) OVER () AS min_worker_count, MAX(worker_count) OVER () AS max_worker_count FROM zone_worker_counts ), current_batch AS ( SELECT b.batch_id, b.deadline_at FROM batches b WHERE b.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' ORDER BY b.batch_id DESC LIMIT 1 ), zone_open_issue_counts AS ( SELECT COALESCE(zl.zone_id, u.assigned_zone_id) AS zone_id, COUNT(*) AS open_issue_count FROM issues i LEFT JOIN zone_locations zl ON zl.location_id = COALESCE(i.zone_location_id, i.new_location_id) LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_id = i.worker_id WHERE i.status = 'OPEN' GROUP BY COALESCE(zl.zone_id, u.assigned_zone_id) ) SELECT z.zone_id AS zoneId, COALESCE(zwr.worker_count, 0) AS workerCount, COALESCE(MAX(zoic.open_issue_count), 0) AS openIssueCount,
-- Progress Calculation COALESCE( (SUM(CASE WHEN bti.status = 'DONE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / NULLIF(COUNT(bti.batch_task_item_id), 0), 0.0 ) AS progressRate, GREATEST( COALESCE(zrs.time_to_deadline_min, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, NOW(), cb.deadline_at)), 0 ) AS remainingDeadlineMinutes, CASE WHEN COALESCE(zrs.cap_per_hour, COALESCE(zwr.worker_count, 0) * 10.0) > 0 THEN ( COALESCE( zrs.total_remaining_qty, SUM(CASE WHEN bti.status = 'DONE' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) ) / COALESCE(zrs.cap_per_hour, COALESCE(zwr.worker_count, 0) * 10.0) ) * 60.0 ELSE NULL END AS estimatedCompletionMinutes,
-- Status Calculation by SLA gap (deadline - ETA) CASE WHEN COALESCE(zwr.worker_count, 0) = 0 THEN 'CRITICAL' WHEN COALESCE(zrs.cap_per_hour, COALESCE(zwr.worker_count, 0) * 10.0) <= 0 THEN 'CRITICAL' WHEN ( GREATEST( COALESCE(zrs.time_to_deadline_min, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, NOW(), cb.deadline_at)), 0 ) - ( COALESCE( zrs.total_remaining_qty, SUM(CASE WHEN bti.status = 'DONE' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) ) / COALESCE(zrs.cap_per_hour, COALESCE(zwr.worker_count, 0) * 10.0) ) * 60.0 ) < 0 THEN 'CRITICAL' WHEN ( GREATEST( COALESCE(zrs.time_to_deadline_min, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, NOW(), cb.deadline_at)), 0 ) - ( COALESCE( zrs.total_remaining_qty, SUM(CASE WHEN bti.status = 'DONE' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) ) / COALESCE(zrs.cap_per_hour, COALESCE(zwr.worker_count, 0) * 10.0) ) * 60.0 ) <= 30 THEN 'NORMAL' ELSE 'STABLE' END AS status
FROM zones z LEFT JOIN users u ON u.assigned_zone_id = z.zone_id AND u.role = 'WORKER' LEFT JOIN work_logs wl ON wl.worker_id = u.user_id AND wl.ended_at IS NULL
-- Join Tasks for Progress Stats LEFT JOIN batch_tasks bt ON bt.zone_id = z.zone_id AND bt.batch_id = ( SELECT b2.batch_id FROM batches b2 WHERE b2.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' ORDER BY b2.batch_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND bt.status IN ('IN_PROGRESS', 'UNASSIGNED', 'COMPLETED') LEFT JOIN batch_task_items bti ON bti.batch_task_id = bt.batch_task_id
-- Join Rebalance Stats (AI ?щ같移??곗씠?? LEFT JOIN zone_rebalance_stats zrs ON zrs.zone_id = z.zone_id LEFT JOIN zone_risk zr ON zr.zone_id = z.zone_id LEFT JOIN zone_worker_ranks zwr ON zwr.zone_id = z.zone_id LEFT JOIN zone_open_issue_counts zoic ON zoic.zone_id = z.zone_id
-- Join Batch for Deadline LEFT JOIN batches b ON b.batch_id = zrs.current_batch_id AND b.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' LEFT JOIN current_batch cb ON 1=1
GROUP BY z.zone_id, zrs.avg_speed_per_hour, zrs.total_remaining_qty, zrs.time_to_deadline_min, zrs.cap_per_hour, b.deadline_at, cb.deadline_at, zwr.worker_count, zwr.rank_low, zwr.rank_high, zwr.min_worker_count, zwr.max_worker_count, zr.risk ORDER BY z.zone_id

WITH move_list AS (
SELECT #{m.workerId} AS worker_id, #{m.toZoneId} AS to_zone_id
SELECT NULL AS worker_id, NULL AS to_zone_id WHERE 1=0
), zone_static_stats AS ( SELECT zone_id, MAX(zone_backlog) AS total_remaining_qty, MAX(batch_id) AS current_batch_id, MAX(time_to_deadline_min) AS time_to_deadline_min, MAX(zone_blocking_issue_cnt) AS block_cnt FROM rebalance_snapshots WHERE ts >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE) GROUP BY zone_id ), zone_cap_sim AS ( SELECT COALESCE(ml.to_zone_id, rs.zone_id) AS zone_id, SUM(COALESCE(NULLIF(rs.speed_label, 0), rs.worker_speed_30m_avg, 0)) AS cap_per_hour FROM rebalance_snapshots rs LEFT JOIN move_list ml ON ml.worker_id = rs.worker_id WHERE rs.ts >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE) GROUP BY COALESCE(ml.to_zone_id, rs.zone_id) ), zone_rebalance_stats AS ( SELECT zs.zone_id, zs.total_remaining_qty, zs.current_batch_id, zs.time_to_deadline_min, zs.block_cnt, COALESCE(zc.cap_per_hour, 0) AS cap_per_hour FROM zone_static_stats zs LEFT JOIN zone_cap_sim zc ON zc.zone_id = zs.zone_id ), zone_risk AS ( SELECT zrs.zone_id AS zone_id, zrs.total_remaining_qty AS backlog, zrs.time_to_deadline_min AS deadline_min, zrs.cap_per_hour AS cap_per_hour, CASE WHEN COALESCE(zrs.block_cnt, 0) > 0 THEN GREATEST( COALESCE(zrs.total_remaining_qty, 0) - (COALESCE(zrs.cap_per_hour, 0) * (COALESCE(zrs.time_to_deadline_min, 0) / 60.0)), 0 ) * 0.2 ELSE GREATEST( COALESCE(zrs.total_remaining_qty, 0) - (COALESCE(zrs.cap_per_hour, 0) * (COALESCE(zrs.time_to_deadline_min, 0) / 60.0)), 0 ) END AS risk FROM zone_rebalance_stats zrs ), zone_worker_counts AS ( SELECT COALESCE(ml.to_zone_id, u.assigned_zone_id) AS zone_id, COUNT(DISTINCT wl.worker_id) AS worker_count FROM users u LEFT JOIN work_logs wl ON wl.worker_id = u.user_id AND wl.ended_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN move_list ml ON ml.worker_id = u.user_id WHERE u.role = 'WORKER' GROUP BY COALESCE(ml.to_zone_id, u.assigned_zone_id) ), zone_worker_ranks AS ( SELECT zone_id, worker_count, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY worker_count ASC) AS rank_low, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY worker_count DESC) AS rank_high, MIN(worker_count) OVER () AS min_worker_count, MAX(worker_count) OVER () AS max_worker_count FROM zone_worker_counts ), current_batch AS ( SELECT b.batch_id, b.deadline_at FROM batches b WHERE b.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' ORDER BY b.batch_id DESC LIMIT 1 ), zone_open_issue_counts AS ( SELECT COALESCE(zl.zone_id, COALESCE(ml.to_zone_id, u.assigned_zone_id)) AS zone_id, COUNT(*) AS open_issue_count FROM issues i LEFT JOIN zone_locations zl ON zl.location_id = COALESCE(i.zone_location_id, i.new_location_id) LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_id = i.worker_id LEFT JOIN move_list ml ON ml.worker_id = u.user_id WHERE i.status = 'OPEN' GROUP BY COALESCE(zl.zone_id, COALESCE(ml.to_zone_id, u.assigned_zone_id)) ) SELECT z.zone_id AS zoneId, COALESCE(zwr.worker_count, 0) AS workerCount, COALESCE(MAX(zoic.open_issue_count), 0) AS openIssueCount,
-- Progress Calculation COALESCE( (SUM(CASE WHEN bti.status = 'DONE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / NULLIF(COUNT(bti.batch_task_item_id), 0), 0.0 ) AS progressRate, GREATEST( COALESCE(zrs.time_to_deadline_min, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, NOW(), cb.deadline_at)), 0 ) AS remainingDeadlineMinutes, CASE WHEN COALESCE(zrs.cap_per_hour, COALESCE(zwr.worker_count, 0) * 10.0) > 0 THEN ( COALESCE( zrs.total_remaining_qty, SUM(CASE WHEN bti.status = 'DONE' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) ) / COALESCE(zrs.cap_per_hour, COALESCE(zwr.worker_count, 0) * 10.0) ) * 60.0 ELSE NULL END AS estimatedCompletionMinutes,
-- Status Calculation by SLA gap (deadline - ETA) CASE WHEN COALESCE(zwr.worker_count, 0) = 0 THEN 'CRITICAL' WHEN COALESCE(zrs.cap_per_hour, COALESCE(zwr.worker_count, 0) * 10.0) <= 0 THEN 'CRITICAL' WHEN ( GREATEST( COALESCE(zrs.time_to_deadline_min, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, NOW(), cb.deadline_at)), 0 ) - ( COALESCE( zrs.total_remaining_qty, SUM(CASE WHEN bti.status = 'DONE' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) ) / COALESCE(zrs.cap_per_hour, COALESCE(zwr.worker_count, 0) * 10.0) ) * 60.0 ) < 0 THEN 'CRITICAL' WHEN ( GREATEST( COALESCE(zrs.time_to_deadline_min, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, NOW(), cb.deadline_at)), 0 ) - ( COALESCE( zrs.total_remaining_qty, SUM(CASE WHEN bti.status = 'DONE' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) ) / COALESCE(zrs.cap_per_hour, COALESCE(zwr.worker_count, 0) * 10.0) ) * 60.0 ) <= 30 THEN 'NORMAL' ELSE 'STABLE' END AS status
FROM zones z LEFT JOIN users u ON u.assigned_zone_id = z.zone_id AND u.role = 'WORKER' LEFT JOIN work_logs wl ON wl.worker_id = u.user_id AND wl.ended_at IS NULL
-- Join Tasks for Progress Stats LEFT JOIN batch_tasks bt ON bt.zone_id = z.zone_id AND bt.batch_id = ( SELECT b2.batch_id FROM batches b2 WHERE b2.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' ORDER BY b2.batch_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND bt.status IN ('IN_PROGRESS', 'UNASSIGNED', 'COMPLETED') LEFT JOIN batch_task_items bti ON bti.batch_task_id = bt.batch_task_id
-- Join Rebalance Stats LEFT JOIN zone_rebalance_stats zrs ON zrs.zone_id = z.zone_id LEFT JOIN zone_risk zr ON zr.zone_id = z.zone_id LEFT JOIN zone_worker_ranks zwr ON zwr.zone_id = z.zone_id LEFT JOIN zone_open_issue_counts zoic ON zoic.zone_id = z.zone_id
-- Join Batch for Deadline LEFT JOIN batches b ON b.batch_id = zrs.current_batch_id AND b.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' LEFT JOIN current_batch cb ON 1=1
GROUP BY z.zone_id, zrs.total_remaining_qty, zrs.time_to_deadline_min, zrs.cap_per_hour, b.deadline_at, cb.deadline_at, zwr.worker_count, zwr.rank_low, zwr.rank_high, zwr.min_worker_count, zwr.max_worker_count, zr.risk ORDER BY z.zone_id

SELECT DISTINCT u.user_id AS workerId, u.name AS name, u.phone_number AS phoneNumber, COALESCE(wc.daily_count, 0) AS workCount, COALESCE(wc.processing_speed, 0.0) AS processingSpeed, COALESCE(wc.progress, 0.0) AS currentTaskProgress, 'WORKING' AS status, 'AVAILABLE' AS webrtcStatus FROM users u INNER JOIN work_logs wl ON wl.worker_id = u.user_id AND wl.ended_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN ( SELECT bt.worker_id, -- Work Count: Items completed in current batch COUNT(CASE WHEN bti.status = 'DONE' THEN 1 END) AS daily_count, -- Progress: Total done / Total items for current batch task (SUM(CASE WHEN bti.status = 'DONE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / NULLIF(COUNT(bti.batch_task_item_id), 0) AS progress, -- Speed (Dummy logic for now: 10 items/hour?) 10.0 AS processing_speed FROM batch_tasks bt LEFT JOIN batch_task_items bti ON bti.batch_task_id = bt.batch_task_id WHERE bt.batch_id = ( SELECT b.batch_id FROM batches b WHERE b.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' ORDER BY b.batch_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AND bt.zone_id = #{zoneId} GROUP BY bt.worker_id ) wc ON wc.worker_id = u.user_id WHERE u.assigned_zone_id = #{zoneId} AND u.role = 'WORKER'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT wl.worker_id) FROM work_logs wl INNER JOIN users u ON u.user_id = wl.worker_id WHERE wl.ended_at IS NULL AND u.role = 'WORKER' -- WORKER ??븷留??꾪꽣留?(ADMIN ?쒖쇅)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM issues WHERE status = 'OPEN'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM issues i JOIN zone_locations zl ON i.zone_location_id = zl.location_id JOIN users admin_u ON admin_u.user_id = #{adminId} WHERE i.status = 'OPEN' AND zl.zone_id = admin_u.assigned_zone_id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM issues WHERE status = 'RESOLVED' AND DATE(CONVERT_TZ(resolved_at, '+00:00', '+09:00')) = CURDATE()

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM issues i JOIN zone_locations zl ON i.zone_location_id = zl.location_id JOIN users admin_u ON admin_u.user_id = #{adminId} WHERE i.status = 'RESOLVED' AND zl.zone_id = admin_u.assigned_zone_id AND DATE(CONVERT_TZ(i.resolved_at, '+00:00', '+09:00')) = CURDATE()

SELECT u.user_id AS workerId, u.name AS name, u.assigned_zone_id AS zoneId, u.phone_number AS phoneNumber, zl.location_code AS currentLocationCode, -- 湲덉씪 ?묒뾽 泥섎━??(?쒕툕荑쇰━) ( SELECT COUNT(bti.batch_task_item_id) FROM batch_tasks bt_sub JOIN batch_task_items bti ON bti.batch_task_id = bt_sub.batch_task_id WHERE bt_sub.worker_id = u.user_id AND bti.status NOT IN ('PENDING', 'IN_PROGRESS') AND DATE(bti.last_scanned_at) = CURDATE() ) AS todayWorkCount, -- 理쒓렐 諛쒖깮???댁뒋 (?쒕툕荑쇰━) ( SELECT issue_type FROM issues WHERE worker_id = u.user_id AND status = 'OPEN' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS recentIssueType, ( SELECT issue_id FROM issues WHERE worker_id = u.user_id AND status = 'OPEN' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS recentIssueId FROM users u -- ?쒖꽦 ?묒뾽???뺤씤 (異쒓렐 以? INNER JOIN work_logs wl ON wl.worker_id = u.user_id AND wl.ended_at IS NULL -- ?꾩옱 ?꾩튂 (吏꾪뻾 以묒씤 ?묒뾽???꾩튂) LEFT JOIN batch_tasks bt ON bt.worker_id = u.user_id AND bt.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' LEFT JOIN zone_locations zl ON zl.location_id = bt.current_location_id WHERE u.user_id = #{workerId}
mapper.update: UPDATE zone_assignments SET ended_at = NOW() WHERE worker_id = #{workerId} AND ended_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO zone_assignments (worker_id, zone_id, assignment_type, source, started_at, reason) VALUES (#{workerId}, #{zoneId}, 'BASE', 'ADMIN', NOW(), #{reason})
INSERT INTO zone_assignments (worker_id, zone_id, assignment_type, source, started_at, reason) VALUES (#{workerId}, #{zoneId}, #{type}, #{source}, NOW(), #{reason})
mapper.select: SELECT line_id AS lineId, line_name AS lineName FROM zone_lines WHERE zone_id = #{zoneId}

SELECT u.user_id AS workerId, u.name AS name, u.phone_number AS phoneNumber, zl.location_code AS currentLocationCode, CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, bt.started_at, NOW()) >= #{thresholdSeconds} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isBottleneck, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM issues i WHERE i.worker_id = u.user_id AND i.status = 'OPEN' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS hasOpenIssue, ( SELECT i.issue_type FROM issues i WHERE i.worker_id = u.user_id AND i.status = 'OPEN' ORDER BY i.created_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS openIssueType FROM users u -- ?쒖꽦 ?묒뾽??(異쒓렐 以? INNER JOIN work_logs wl ON wl.worker_id = u.user_id AND wl.ended_at IS NULL -- ?꾩옱 吏꾪뻾 以묒씤 ?묒뾽 (?꾩튂 ?뚯븙?? INNER JOIN batch_tasks bt ON bt.worker_id = u.user_id AND bt.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' INNER JOIN zone_locations zl ON zl.location_id = bt.current_location_id WHERE u.assigned_zone_id = #{zoneId} AND u.role = 'WORKER' -- WORKER ??븷留??꾪꽣留?(ADMIN ?쒖쇅)

SELECT u.user_id AS adminId, u.name AS rawName, u.phone_number AS phoneNumber, u.assigned_zone_id AS assignedZoneId,
-- 理쒖떊 洹쇰Т ?곹깭 (Window Function 寃곌낵 ?댁슜) IFNULL(le.event_type, 'END') AS currentStatus FROM users u
-- ?꾩옱 吏꾪뻾 以묒씤 洹쇰Т 濡쒓렇 ?뺤씤 (?놁쑝硫??닿렐 ?곹깭) LEFT JOIN work_logs wl ON wl.worker_id = u.user_id AND wl.ended_at IS NULL
-- 理쒖떊 ?대깽??議곗씤 (ROW_NUMBER ?ъ슜, idx_work_log_events_log_time ?몃뜳???쒖슜) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT work_log_id, event_type, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY work_log_id ORDER BY occurred_at DESC) as rn FROM work_log_events ) le ON wl.work_log_id = le.work_log_id AND le.rn = 1
WHERE u.role = 'ADMIN'
AND u.assigned_zone_id = #{zoneId}
AND u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
ORDER BY u.name ASC

SELECT z.zone_id FROM zones z LEFT JOIN users u ON u.assigned_zone_id = z.zone_id AND u.role = 'WORKER' LEFT JOIN work_logs wl ON wl.worker_id = u.user_id AND wl.ended_at IS NULL GROUP BY z.zone_id ORDER BY COUNT(wl.work_log_id) ASC, z.zone_id ASC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
